mapper.sql: id, question_code, status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM questionnaire_question WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questionnaire_question (question_code, status, created_by, created_time, delete_flag) VALUES (#{questionCode}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE questionnaire_question SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE questionnaire_question SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE questionnaire_question SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, question_id, question_text, language, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag FROM questionnaire_question_text WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY language
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questionnaire_question_text (question_id, question_text, language, created_by, created_time, delete_flag) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{questionText}, #{language}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE questionnaire_question_text SET question_text = #{questionText}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE questionnaire_question_text SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM questionnaire_question_text WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND language = #{language} AND delete_flag = 0
AND id != #{excludeId}
